description: Experienced web developer skilled in creating customer-oriented websites, designing efficient user interfaces, and delivering successful projects for business growth. Also proficient in developing machine learning models and utilizing computer vision libraries.
footerText: Welcome to my personal website, where I proudly showcase my strengths and skills. Explore my journey, accomplishments, and occasional blog posts. Thank you for visiting!
aboutme: Hi! I'm Borneel, amd welcome to my digital realm. Here, you'll discover my life through a dynamic blend of portfolio, services, personal blogs, and photography. Each section reveals a different facet of my journey. Your visit is greatly appreciated, so take your time to explore, and feel free to connect for inquiries or collaborations. Thanks for stopping by, and let's embark on this creative adventure together!

I am a seasoned software developer with 3+ years of expertise in Next.js, React, Node.js, and Tailwind CSS. In addition to my proficiency in Machine Learning & AI development, I bring specialized knowledge in creating user-centric and visually engaging interfaces. My commitment to staying abreast of industry trends is reflected in my contributions to web and mobile app development, ensuring seamless user experiences and project success. With a background in developing machine learning models and working with computer vision libraries, I offer a unique blend of skills. Currently pursuing an MSc. in Web Engineering from Technische Universität Chemnitz, Germany, and holding a B.Tech (Computer Science & Engineering) degree from Kalinga Institute of Industrial Technology, Bhubaneswar, India, I am passionate about both Machine Learning and Fullstack Development. If you're seeking a dedicated professional with a creative flair and technical acumen for your team, look no further.

This website serves as a comprehensive platform to showcase my diverse talents and experiences. It's a window into my world, where you can explore my professional journey through an extensive portfolio, featuring the projects I've worked on and the skills I've honed over the years. Additionally, you can delve into my travel adventures, tech insights, and research findings through engaging blog posts. Client testimonials provide a glimpse into my professional relationships and the quality of work I deliver. Beyond the tech realm, you'll find a peek into my personal interests, hobbies, and a collection of photographs capturing moments from my life. Whether you're here for my work or simply to get to know me better, this website offers a multifaceted perspective on who I am and what I'm passionate about.
